title: andropogon campestris
intro: Andropogon campestris, also known as Bengal grass or Dhaanya, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Andropogon campestris include relief from fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Andropogon campestris is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including skin infections and digestive issues.
